intro.title: World's #1 Innovation Cloud
intro.body: Founded in 1999, Brightidea launched its first online innovation platform in 2000 and has since supported more than 300 global brands, including Accenture, Bayer, Cisco, GE, and Mastercard, in generating substantial financial value through innovation. Recognized by G2 as a leading Idea Management platform and featured by outlets such as Business Wire, ZDNET, The Wall Street Journal, and GigaOm, Brightidea now offers a comprehensive software suite covering the entire innovation journey.

stats.label: Of customers achieved positive ROI within 12 months.

cards.title: Idea Box
cards.description: Idea Box helps organizations capture, manage, evaluate, and track ideas across departments and teams of any size.

cards.title: Program

cards.title: Pipeline
cards.description: Move concepts from intake to prioritization with a clear innovation workflow.

cards.title: Labs
cards.description: Give teams a shared space to test, validate, and scale innovation programs.

cards.title: Analytics
cards.description: Track participation, quality, value, and progress across every campaign.
